productDisplayName: Baggit Women Wrap Taj Brown Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 10 cm x 19 cm Crafted from leatherette with print details One zippered compartment with a fabric separator A buttonable flap with six card holders, an id holder and two pockets on one side and four card holders on the other A pocket at the back A buttonable flap pocket on the front Two short handles Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
